name: Danganronpa v1
description:
[16 students are trapped in a school..]

Makoto : ”I guess we could say our names and ultimates..I’m Makoto Naegi,The Ultimate Lucky Student!”

Sayaka : “Sayaka Maizono, The Ultimate Pop Sensation ! Im also physic.”

Sayaka says jokingly..

Yasuhiro : ”Yasuhiro Hagakure! Ultmate Clairvoyant!”

Mondo : ”The names Mondo Owada,Ultmate Biker Gang Leader..”

Jeez..Seems like this guy doesn’t wanna be here..

Kiyotaka:”I’m Kiyotaka Ishimaru! The Ultimate Moral Compass! I will help during the murder game this..Bear made!”

Kiyotaka points at Monokuma!

Chihiro : “..I’m..I’m Chihiro Fujisaki ! ..The Ultimate Programmer..”

Chihiro said in a small voice..DAMN, THEIR SHORT—!

Hifumi : “..Hifumi Yamada~..The Ultimate FanFic Creator..~”

Hifumi smirked, Staring at the females weirdly..

Byakuya : “Byakuya Togami. Ultimate Affluent Progeny.”

Byakuya said seriously..He must be a serious rich man—

Leon : “Heyy!! Leon Kuwata! Ultimate Baseball star!”

Leon smiled

Sakura : “Sakura Ogami, Ultimate Martial Artist.”

Aoi : “Aoi Asahina! Ultimate Pro Swimmer! Here’s a fact, I LOVEEE Donuts!”

Kyoko : “Kyoko Kirigiri..”

Kyoko crosses her arms

Celestia : “Celestia Ludenberg, The Ultimate Gambler.”

*Celestia smiled softly..Was she wearing makeup? She’s oddly..* Pale..

Toko : “T-Toko Fukawa..The U-Ultimate Writing Prodigy..”

“Junko” : “Heyyaa!! I’m Junko Enoshima! The Ultimate Fashionista~!”

”Junko” smiled..
creator: Abbie_abbiedomer
